name: ◁ Dill Potato Salad
servings: prep time: 10 minutes, plus 2 hours chilling

ingredients.item: 1 large bunch fresh dill, finely chopped and thick stems removed
ingredients.original: 1 large bunch fresh dill, finely chopped and thick stems removed

ingredients.item: 1½ cups (75 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: 1½ cups (75 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 2 cups (280 g) finely chopped pickled turnips (or substitute with 3 large dill pickles, finely chopped)
ingredients.original: 2 cups (280 g) finely chopped pickled turnips (or substitute with 3 large dill pickles, finely chopped)

ingredients.item:
DRESSING
1 cup (240 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
½ cup (120 ml) mayonnaise
ingredients.original:
DRESSING
1 cup (240 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
½ cup (120 ml) mayonnaise

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons ground Aleppo pepper (or substitute with 1 teaspoon paprika plus ¼ teaspoon cayenne pepper)
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons ground Aleppo pepper (or substitute with 1 teaspoon paprika plus ¼ teaspoon cayenne pepper)

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE POTATO SALAD: Fill a large pot more than halfway with water and place over medium heat. Add the 2 teaspoons salt and bring to a boil.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE POTATO SALAD: Fill a large pot more than halfway with water and place over medium heat. Add the 2 teaspoons salt and bring to a boil.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the potatoes to the boiling water and boil until fork-tender, 10 to 12 minutes. Drain in a colander and let cool completely.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the potatoes to the boiling water and boil until fork-tender, 10 to 12 minutes. Drain in a colander and let cool completely.

ingredients.item: 3 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE DRESSING: In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, mayonnaise, relish, Dijon mustard, Aleppo pepper, and 1 teaspoon salt.
ingredients.original: 3 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE DRESSING: In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, mayonnaise, relish, Dijon mustard, Aleppo pepper, and 1 teaspoon salt.

ingredients.item: 4 Place the cooled potatoes, dill, green onions, parsley and pickles in a large bowl and add the dressing. Toss to combine well.
ingredients.original: 4 Place the cooled potatoes, dill, green onions, parsley and pickles in a large bowl and add the dressing. Toss to combine well.

ingredients.item: 5 Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving for best results.
ingredients.original: 5 Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving for best results.

ingredients.item:
CABBAGE SLAW
14 ounces (400 g) white or purple cabbage, shredded
7 ounces (200 g) carrots, shredded
ingredients.original:
CABBAGE SLAW
14 ounces (400 g) white or purple cabbage, shredded
7 ounces (200 g) carrots, shredded

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
